A Little About Me

Where creativity meets
organization

Hi again! I'm Maricon, a Magna Cum Laude graduate from PUP Maragondon, and honestly, someone who just genuinely enjoys being helpful and making things better.

Over the past 5+ years I've worn a lot of hats: supporting executives, running social media for growing organizations, producing live streams, designing visuals, and writing content that actually connects with people.

I thrive in remote setups because I'm self-driven and organized by nature. I don't wait to be told what needs doing. I notice, I plan, and I get it done. If you're looking for someone who cares about your work as much as you do, I'd love to be that person.
